# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

name: "Search Cluster"
  elasticsearch_version: 7.10.2
  cluster_name: "search-cluster"
  node_count: 1
  network:
    host: 0.0.0.0
    transport: 9300-9400
  discovery:
    type: single-node
  logging:
    indices:
      - index: "search"
        type: "docs"
        number_of_shards: 1
        number_of_replicas: 1
  plugins:
    - plugin: "analysis-icu"
    - plugin: "ingest-geoip"
    - plugin: "analysis-phonetic"
    - plugin: "analysis-stempel"
    - plugin: "analysis-ukrainian"
    - plugin: "analysis-ukrainian-stop"
    - plugin: "analysis-ngram"
    - plugin: "ingest-geoip"
